assertions.description: The design has 6 IRF150P220XKMA1 power MOSFETs (Q1-Q6) arranged as three half-bridge pairs driven by three IR2112 gate drivers. Neither the bridge topology nor the individual MOSFET switch circuits are detected.
The motor controller has 9 UF4004 fast-recovery diodes (D1-D9) as flyback/freewheeling diodes for the MOSFET switches and bootstrap circuits. protection_devices=[] despite all 9 diodes being present.
